catalyst_synthesis.description: Information regarding the synthesis and preparation of the catalytic materials.

catalyst_name.description: The specific identifier or name of the catalyst sample used in the study.

parent_material.description: The base material or support used before modification (e.g., ZSM-5).

synthesis_method.description: General description of the synthesis technique (e.g., wet impregnation, chemical dealumination).

preparation_details.description: Specific parameters and steps in the preparation process.

metal_precursor.description: Precursor used for metal deposition (e.g., Au(en)2Cl3).

structure_directing_agent.description: Organic template or OSDA used during synthesis (e.g., carbocation-like mimics).

ligand_agent.description: Ligand or chelating agent used to protect metal ions or control cluster formation (e.g., EDTA).

calcination_temperature_celsius.description: Temperature used for calcination of the catalyst.

surface_modification_treatment.description: Treatments applied to modify the surface properties, such as passivation (e.g., CLD with TEOS).

catalyst_characterization.description: Physicochemical properties of the synthesized catalysts.

zeolite_framework_type.description: Three-letter code identifying the zeolite framework topology (e.g., MFI, BEA, FAU).

framework_ring_size.description: Size of the rings defining the pore openings (e.g., 10-membered ring, 12MR).

channel_dimensionality.description: Dimensionality of the pore channel system (e.g., 3D, 2D, 1D).

crystallite_size_microns.description: Average size or size range of the catalyst crystals/particles (e.g., 0.2-0.3 μm).

material_composition.description: Elemental and chemical composition of the catalyst.

metal_loading_wt_percent.description: Weight percentage of the active metal (e.g., Au) loaded.

si_al_ratio_framework.description: Framework silicon-to-aluminum ratio determined by NMR.

proton_to_aluminum_ratio.description: Ratio of protons to aluminum atoms, often determined by isotopic exchange (H+/Al).

residual_alkali_content_wt_percent.description: Content of residual alkali metals (e.g., Na) remaining after exchange.

aluminum_distribution.description: Analysis of aluminum siting within the zeolite framework.

close_al_sites_mmol_g.description: Concentration of paired or 'close' aluminum atoms.

single_al_percentage.description: Percentage of aluminum atoms in 'single' sites.

aluminum_siting_location.description: Specific location of Al sites within the pore structure (e.g., straight channel, intersection).

defect_properties.description: Characterization of structural defects in the zeolite framework (e.g., silanol nests).

defect_type.description: Type of defect identified (e.g., silanol nest, open Sn site).

defect_concentration.description: Concentration or relative abundance of the defects.

identification_technique.description: Technique used to identify the defects (e.g., DRIFTS, NMR).

textural_properties.description: Surface area and pore structure characteristics.

bet_surface_area_m2_g.description: Specific surface area calculated by BET method.

total_pore_volume_cm3_g.description: Total pore volume of the catalyst.

pore_architecture.description: Description of the pore connectivity and hierarchy (e.g., wormhole-like, hierarchical).

pore_size_distribution.description: Description of pore size range and distribution.

strong_acid_sites_mmol_g.description: Concentration of strong acid sites (e.g., from high-temp TPD).

bronsted_lewis_ratio.description: Ratio of Brønsted to Lewis acid sites (B/L or L/B).

acid_strength_distribution.description: Qualitative description of weak, medium, and strong acid sites.

acid_site_density.description: Density of acid sites per unit area or volume, often used to describe proximity.

external_acid_sites_mmol_g.description: Concentration of acid sites located on the external surface of the crystal.

internal_acid_sites_mmol_g.description: Concentration of acid sites located within the internal pore system.

acidity_probe_molecules.description: Molecules used to probe acidity (e.g., Pyridine, DTBPy).

metal_species_properties.description: Properties of the supported metal species (e.g., Au, Zn, Pt, Sn).

particle_size_nm.description: Size or size range of metal nanoparticles.

oxidation_state.description: Oxidation state of the metal (e.g., Au0, Au+, Zn2+, Sn4+).

coordination_environment.description: Description of local coordination (e.g., Au-Au bonds, Pt-O-Sn).

bond_lengths_angstrom.description: Measured or calculated bond distances (e.g., Zn-O distance).

electronic_interaction.description: Evidence of electron transfer or metal-support interaction.

reaction_intermediate_characterization.description: Detailed characterization of reaction intermediates and transient species identified during the reaction.

intermediate_species.description: List of distinct intermediate species characterized.

name.description: Name or chemical identifier of the species (e.g., tert-butyl cation, heptamethylbenzenium).

category.description: Classification of the species (e.g., carbenium ion, carbonium ion, alkoxide).

host_framework.description: Zeolite framework or catalyst in which the intermediate was observed.

role.description: The specific role of the intermediate (e.g., active intermediate, coke precursor, transition state).

confinement_location.description: Location where the species is confined (e.g., channel intersection, sinusoidal channel).

structural_features.description: Description of geometric features (e.g., bond angles, coordination number).

geometric_parameters.description: Key geometric measures (bond lengths, angles) defining the intermediate structure.

formation_energy.description: Energy required to form the intermediate (e.g., endothermic by X kJ/mol).

adsorption_energy_kj_mol.description: Calculated adsorption energy of the species.

isotopic_content_percentage.description: Measured isotopic incorporation (e.g., % 12C) in the species.

fluorescence_properties.description: Description of fluorescence emission or confocal microscopy observations.

catalytic_performance.description: Experimental data from catalytic reaction testing.

reaction_type.description: Name or type of the reaction (e.g., n-octane cracking).

reaction_mode.description: Mode of reactor operation (e.g., Continuous flow, Pulse, In-situ, Ex-situ).

performance_regime.description: Phase of the reaction where metrics were recorded (e.g., Induction period, Steady state, Deactivation).

feedstock_type.description: Specific type of biomass or feedstock used (e.g., Pine sawdust, Algal biomass).

reactor_conditions.description: Operating conditions for the reaction test.

pulse_volume_microliters.description: Volume of reactant injected per pulse in pulse-mode experiments.

catalyst_to_feed_mass_ratio.description: Mass ratio of catalyst to biomass/feedstock.

carrier_gas_flow_rate_ml_min.description: Flow rate of the carrier gas.

kinetic_metrics.description: Quantitative kinetic parameters derived from performance testing.

specific_activity.description: Activity normalized by mass of catalyst or active metal (e.g., mol_prod g_cat-1 h-1).

site_time_yield.description: Yield per active site per unit time (e.g., 10^-3 s^-1).

apparent_activation_energy_kj_mol.description: Apparent activation energy determined from Arrhenius plots.

isotopic_exchange_rate.description: Rate of isotopic exchange or scrambling measured in tracer studies.

kinetic_isotope_effect_parameter.description: Measured kinetic isotope effect (KIE) value (e.g., rH/rD).

deactivation_coefficient.description: Parameter quantifying catalyst deactivation rate (e.g., kd or inverse deactivation coefficient).

performance_metrics.description: Quantitative results of the catalytic test.

degree_of_deoxygenation_percentage.description: Percentage of oxygen removed from the feedstock (DOD).

bio_oil_yield_wt_percent.description: Yield of the liquid bio-oil fraction.

char_yield_wt_percent.description: Yield of the solid char fraction.

gas_yield_wt_percent.description: Yield of the gaseous product fraction.

bio_oil_oxygen_content_wt_percent.description: Oxygen content in the upgraded bio-oil.

bio_oil_h_c_molar_ratio.description: Hydrogen to Carbon molar ratio in the bio-oil.

bio_oil_o_c_molar_ratio.description: Oxygen to Carbon molar ratio in the bio-oil.

hydrogen_transfer_index.description: Index quantifying hydrogen transfer activity (e.g., C5 alkanes / total C5).

isotopic_distribution_pattern.description: Observed distribution of isotopes in products (e.g., binomial, hypergeometric).

coke_yield_percentage.description: Amount of coke formed as a percentage of feed.

stability_test.description: Information on catalyst stability and reusability.

observation.description: Qualitative observation of stability (e.g., stable, deactivation).

industrial_process_specification.description: Details identifying the industrial process, its design capacity, and simulation basis.

process_name.description: Name of the process variant (e.g., Calcium carbide process with heat integration).

process_type.description: Classification of the synthesis route (e.g., Calcium carbide based, Urea based).

annual_capacity_tons.description: Designed annual output of the process in tons.

technology_readiness_level.description: Assessed TRL of the technology (e.g., TRL 3-4, TRL 9).

simulation_software.description: Software used for modeling and simulation (e.g., Aspen Plus V10).

heat_integration_strategy.description: Description of heat recovery and integration methods applied.

techno_economic_assessment.description: Economic evaluation metrics and cost analysis of the process.

currency_basis.description: Year and currency basis for the economic analysis (e.g., 2021 USD).

total_capital_investment_million_usd.description: Total investment cost required for the process.

unit_production_cost_usd_per_ton.description: Cost to produce one unit of product.

product_profit_usd_per_ton.description: Profit generated per unit of product.

net_present_value_million_usd.description: Calculated Net Present Value (NPV) of the project.

payback_period_years.description: Time required to recover the investment cost.

economic_sensitivity_factors.description: List of factors analyzed for their impact on economic performance (e.g., Electricity price, Carbon tax).

environmental_and_efficiency_metrics.description: Environmental impact, energy consumption, and thermodynamic efficiency indicators.

total_energy_consumption_gj_per_ton.description: Total energy consumed per unit of product.

exergy_efficiency_percentage.description: Exergy efficiency of the overall process.

exergy_loss_rate_kw.description: Rate of exergy loss in the process.

element_efficiency_nitrogen_percentage.description: Efficiency of nitrogen utilization in the product.

element_efficiency_carbon_percentage.description: Efficiency of carbon utilization in the product.

co2_emissions_total_ton_per_ton.description: Total carbon dioxide emissions per unit of product.

co2_emissions_direct_ton_per_ton.description: Direct carbon dioxide emissions from the process.

co2_emissions_indirect_ton_per_ton.description: Indirect carbon dioxide emissions (e.g., from electricity generation).

so2_emissions_ton_per_ton.description: Sulfur dioxide emissions per unit of product.

nox_emissions_ton_per_ton.description: Nitrogen oxides emissions per unit of product.

theoretical_investigation.description: Computational studies and theoretical modeling outcomes presented in the article.

methodology.description: Computational method used (e.g., DFT, AIMD, hybrid QM:QM).

software_package.description: Software used for calculations (e.g., VASP, Gaussian).

dft_functional.description: Density functional used (e.g., PBE, B3LYP, BEEF-vdW).

basis_set.description: Basis set used for electronic structure calculations (e.g., 6-31G(d,p), def2-TZVP).

force_field.description: Force field used in molecular mechanics or hybrid calculations (e.g., UFF, CHARMM).

dispersion_correction_method.description: Method used to account for van der Waals interactions.

model_details.description: Description of the zeolite model (e.g., 46T cluster, periodic model).

label.description: Label used in the paper (e.g., ZnOH+, Site A).

geometric_parameters.description: Key geometric measures (bond lengths, angles) defining the active site structure.

thermodynamic_stability_analysis.description: Analysis of the thermodynamic stability of different species or phases.

conditions.description: Conditions under which stability was analyzed (e.g., H2/H2O pressure).

relative_stability_order.description: Observed order of stability for the modeled sites.

microkinetic_modeling_details.description: Details and results of microkinetic simulations.

elementary_steps_energetics.description: Structured data for elementary reaction steps.

site_label.description: The active site on which this step occurs.

activation_barriers.description: Calculated activation energies or barriers (e.g., in kJ/mol).

reaction_energies.description: Thermodynamic reaction energies or heat of adsorption.

species_lifetimes.description: Calculated lifetimes of intermediates (e.g., in ps).

dynamic_behavior.description: Observations from molecular dynamics (e.g., rotational freedom, diffusion).

reaction_mechanism.description: Insights into the reaction mechanism and active site roles.

proposed_pathway.description: Description of the dominant reaction pathway (e.g., monomolecular vs bimolecular).

dominant_reaction_pathway_types.description: List of dominant reaction types identified (e.g., HDO, Decarbonylation, Dehydration).

reaction_cycles.description: Specific catalytic cycles identified in the mechanism (e.g., aromatic cycle, alkene cycle).

mechanistic_concepts.description: Theoretical concepts applied to explain reactivity (e.g., Frustrated Lewis Pairs, confinement effect).

role_of_gold.description: Specific function attributed to gold species (e.g., dehydrogenation, electron donor).

role_of_metal_species.description: Specific function attributed to the metal species (e.g., dehydrogenation, H-atom recombination) generalizing beyond gold.

role_of_acidity.description: Function of acid sites in the mechanism.

hydrogen_spillover_role.description: Description of the role of hydrogen spillover in the reaction.

synergistic_effects.description: Description of cooperation between different active sites (e.g., Au and acid sites).

rate_determining_step_experimental.description: The rate-determining step identified through experimental kinetics and isotopic studies.

step_reversibility.description: Description of the reversibility of key mechanistic steps (e.g., dehydrogenation, adsorption).

surface_coverage_dynamics.description: Dynamics of surface species coverage, including concepts like virtual surface pressure or pool composition.
